name: bookindex-aaz
description: E2E smoke checks for aaz-index standalone app

scripts.content:audit: python scripts/content_report.py app_data.json --write-quality-queue tests/index-audit-queue.json --write-context-pack tests/context-entry-pack.json --write-context-pack-md tests/context-entry-pack.md
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run check:parity && npm run check:js && npm run check:ui && npm run check:e2e:smoke
scripts.check:js: node --check v3_app.js && node --check scripts/build_aaz_index.mjs && node --check scripts/dev/static-server.mjs && node --check scripts/viz/build-viz-cache.js && node --check scripts/viz/viz-state.js
scripts.check:e2e:smoke: playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js --grep "PWA manifest|names graph|map tab" --workers=1
